skills.name: google-ads-auth
skills.description: Use when working with Google Ads API authentication, developer tokens, OAuth flows, service accounts, access models, or first-call setup problems.

skills.name: google-ads-query
skills.description: Use when writing GAQL, exploring reporting queries, debugging Google Ads search or searchStream usage, or working with change history reporting.

skills.name: google-ads-mutate
skills.description: Use when creating, updating, removing, or bulk-mutating Google Ads resources, including partial failures, temporary IDs, and batch jobs.

skills.name: google-ads-campaigns
skills.description: Use when building or debugging Google Ads campaign setup across search, demand gen, responsive, shopping, dynamic, video, or smart campaign workflows.

skills.name: google-ads-experiments
skills.description: Use when working with Google Ads experiments, experiment arms, promotion, graduation, async errors, or experiment reporting.

skills.name: google-ads-conversions
skills.description: Use when setting up or debugging Google Ads conversions, uploads, adjustments, billing, bid simulations, or reach forecasting.

skills.name: google-ads-assets
skills.description: Use when working with Google Ads assets, asset generation, upload ads, creative assets, or asset troubleshooting.

skills.name: google-ads-account-management
skills.description: Use when creating, linking, listing, or managing Google Ads accounts, hierarchies, invitations, users, or manager relationships.

skills.name: google-ads-planning
skills.description: Use when working with keyword planning, targeting, audience insights, forecasts, or Google Ads developer toolkit workflows.

skills.name: google-ads-productionize
skills.description: Use when preparing Google Ads API integrations for production, including monitoring, logging, security, quota posture, release tracking, and upgrades.

skills.name: google-ads-troubleshooting
skills.description: Use when debugging Google Ads API errors, policy exemptions, quotas, partial failures, warnings, test accounts, or common integration mistakes.

skills.name: google-ads-remarketing
skills.description: Use when implementing or debugging Google Ads remarketing, user lists, audiences, dynamic remarketing, or related list and membership workflows.

skills.name: google-ads-verticals
skills.description: Use when working with Google Ads vertical workflows like hotel ads, things to do ads, or recommendation-specific product flows.
